text: Standing before this room of glass and light, with its walls inviting me into a world of R&D, I feel the distant hum of possibility and curiosity. There is a sense of anticipation in the air, as if new ideas might materialize from the bright, open space. My heart quickens, drawn not only by the promise of innovation but by the reflection of my own wonder in these surfaces. I am simultaneously both spectator and participant in this unfolding narrative of progress.
